audit_findings.finding: AE-H-001 (派生自 audit-2026-07-05-005): build_engine_firmware() L114 返回普通字符串 (非 f-string), L121/124 硬编码 E:/x-tool/.claude/decision-log.jsonl + autonomous-state.md, L135/146 硬编码 wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo service cron start, L151 {PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/watchdog.sh 字面占位符未替换. Linux 原生部署 (本 DevBox sys.platform=linux) 下: 注入路径不存在 + wsl 命令无效 → SessionStart 冷启动协议断裂 (引擎固件每次会话注入却指向死路径). 4 天未修 (audit-2026-07-01-009 结转). bug 证据: 直读 L121 `读 \`E:/x-tool/.claude/decision-log.jsonl\`` 字面量 + L151 `{PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/watchdog.sh` 在普通字符串内 {PROJECT_DIR} 不被替换.
audit_findings.remediation: 新增 _platform_recovery_cmd() (sys.platform=='win32'→wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo service cron start; else→systemctl start cron 2>/dev/null || service cron start 2>/dev/null || true); build_engine_firmware 改 f-string; project_dir_fwd=PROJECT_DIR.replace(chr(92),'/'); E:/x-tool→{project_dir_fwd}; wsl→{recovery_cmd}; {session_id}→{{session_id}} 转义; {PROJECT_DIR}→{project_dir_fwd}. 镜像 x-tool ba9d4f3.
